title: Overview Table

detail.title: Overview Table
detail.short_info: Bihar ITICAT Admission Form 2026 is open for online applications from 16 March to 14 April 2026. Check the BCECEB official website for eligibility, fees, important dates, admit card, and Bihar ITI admission details.

content.text: The Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB) has released the application form for admission to various Industrial Training Institute (ITI) courses in Bihar through the ITICAT 2026 entrance test. Candidates can apply online from 16 March 2026 to 14 April 2026. This guide provides complete details on eligibility, important dates, application steps, fees, required documents, and official links to help you complete the process smoothly.

rows: ITICAT-2026 (Industrial Training Institute Competitive Admission Test)
Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB)

content.text: The ITICAT-2026 is conducted by BCECEB for admission into government and private ITIs in Bihar. The entrance test is followed by counselling for seat allotment. Always refer to the official BCECEB portal for the latest updates, as dates and rules are subject to change.

items: Online Registration Start: 16 March 2026
Last Date to Submit Application: 14 April 2026
Last Date for Fee Payment: 15 April 2026
Application Editing: 16–17 April 2026
Admit Card Download: 08 May 2026
Proposed Exam Date: 17 May 2026

content.text: Candidates must have passed or be appearing in the Class 10 (High School) examination from a recognized board. Specific trade-wise eligibility may apply check the official prospectus for details.

items: Minimum age: 14 years as on 01 August 2026
For Motor Mechanic Tractor (MMT/MT) trades: Minimum 17 years

content.text: There is no upper age limit.

items: Class 10 mark sheet and certificate
Photo and signature (scanned as per specifications)
Caste certificate (if applicable)
Domicile certificate for Bihar residents
Disability certificate (if claiming PH reservation)
Valid email ID and mobile number

sections.heading: How to Apply Online for Bihar ITICAT Admission Form 2026

items: Visit the official online portal Bihar ITICAT.
Click on New Registration and enter basic details (email, mobile).
Verify with OTP and create password.
Login and fill the multi-step application form: Personal Information → Contact Details → Educational Information → Upload Photo & Signature.
Preview, submit, and proceed to payment.
Pay the fee and download the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid While Filling the Form

items: Entering incorrect personal or educational details
Uploading blurred or wrong-sized photo/signature
Paying the wrong fee category
Forgetting to take a printout of the confirmation page
Not checking eligibility before applying
